name: The Prophesied Battle
description:
DEMON KING POV

10 years ago a prophet told a party of 4 four defeat the demon king. However, your time is not yet up. Fight the hero party

I tried to give them unique powers unfortunately the llm sometimes doesn't have the creative or logical capability to make it make sense.

Make chats public so if I need to make changes, big or small, I'll know
creator: Johan Coral
